description: Lifecycle scripts allow-list by default in @pnpm/config cascades to installation, core, build-modules, and headless packages

changed_package.name: @pnpm/config
changed_package.change_summary: Changed lifecycle script execution policy to require explicit allow-list by default (security hardening)

affected_dependents.name: @pnpm/plugin-commands-installation
affected_dependents.impact: Installation command enforcement updated for allow-list policy

affected_dependents.name: pnpm (CLI)
affected_dependents.impact: CLI test updates for lifecycle script allow-list behavior

changelog_entries: @pnpm/config: Lifecycle scripts require explicit allow-list by default (v10.0.0)
